name: memcpy_n2h
title: memcpy_n2h
syntax: void memcpy_n2h(struct dest, byte source[]); // form 1
description: Fills the struct with bytes from the array, and translates the byte order of the elements from big-endian to little-endian (n2h stands for "network to host").

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Array whose bytes shall be copied
